title: Professional CV Builder
description: Create a compelling CV tailored for the UAE job market with our comprehensive builder featuring professional templates, expert guidance, and AI-powered optimization.
quote: A well-crafted CV is your gateway to career opportunities in the UAE's dynamic job market.

builder.label: CV Builder
builder.description: Create a professional CV tailored for the UAE job market with our comprehensive 9-step wizard.

templates.label: Templates
templates.description: Choose from professionally designed templates optimized for different industries and career levels.

tips.label: UAE Tips
tips.description: Expert tips and best practices for creating an outstanding CV for the UAE job market.

analytics.label: Analytics
analytics.description: Track your CV performance and get insights to improve your job search success.

personal.title: Personal Information
personal.photo: Include a professional photo (recommended in UAE)
personal.visa: Add your UAE visa status if applicable
personal.contacts: Provide both English and Arabic contact details

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.context: Include company size and industry context
experience.government: Mention any government or semi-government experience

education.title: Education & Qualifications
education.equivalency: Include degree equivalency for international qualifications

cultural.title: Cultural Considerations
cultural.arabic: Arabic language skills are highly valued
cultural.customs: Respect for local customs and traditions

comingSoon.title: CV Analytics Coming Soon
comingSoon.description: Get detailed insights about your CV performance, download statistics, and optimization suggestions.
